title: Loading Spinner
description: Conditionally render a 'Loading...' text while a loading state is true.
problemStatement:
Handle waiting states! Given a state `isLoading`, use the `&&` short-circuit operator to display a `

Loading...

` tag only when `isLoading` is true. **Requirement:** Use the `&&` operator specifically.
hints: The `&&` operator is great for 'if true, show this' logic in React.
